rows.description: Computus Dno Rectoris S. C. Jonas.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description as it accurately transcribes 'Dno', 'Rectoris', and 'S. C. Jonas.' which are clear in the image, unlike gpt-5-mini's 'Computations Dr to Redemptions H.C. Jones'. Confirmed visually.
rows.section_header: Computus Dno Rectoris S. C. Jonas.

rows.notes: Both extractors largely agreed on the date text. Chose gemini-flash's description due to its accurate inclusion of the period at the end, confirmed visually.
Selected gemini-flash's description which accurately reads 'revolutum' and includes the period, confirmed by visual inspection. gpt-5-mini read 'revolutionis'.
Selected gemini-flash's description, which correctly transcribes the Latin terms 'Arrearagia recepta' as seen in the image. gpt-5-mini's 'Arrearages receipts' was incorrect.
Selected gemini-flash's description, as 'Honey' is clearly visible (not 'Money') and the abbreviation is '&c' without a final 'd'. Confirmed visually.
Selected gemini-flash's description 'Gwincair' as it appears more accurate visually compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Gwinear'. Amounts agreed by both and are clear.
rows.english_description: Arrears of rent from Gwincair rectory covering two and a half years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of rent from Gwincair rectory covering two and a half years, amounting to £150 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description 'Stanfremot' as it is clearly legible in the image, overriding gpt-5-mini's 'Muckennott'. Amounts agreed by both and are clear.
rows.english_description: Arrears of rent from Stanfremot rectory for three years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of rent from Stanfremot rectory for three years, amounting to £60 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description 'Hillington' as it is clearly legible in the image, overriding gpt-5-mini's 'Kidlington'. Amounts agreed by both and are clear.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of rent from Hillington rectory for one and a half years, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's amounts, confirmed visually as £2 13s 0d. Adopted gemini-flash's description for 'Colbens', and corrected 'Gravess' to 'Graves' based on visual inspection, overriding gpt-5-mini's less accurate reading of 'Cefone & Mason'.
rows.english_description: Arrears of rent from Hillington — the Colbens and Graves tenements for one and a half years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of rent from Hillington — the Colbens and Graves tenements for one and a half years, amounting to £2 13s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description and amounts, which are accurate. Visually confirmed 'Horres' (not 'Norris'), '1½' (not '1 yr'), and the amounts as £9 6s 8d (not £2 16s 8d).

rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of rent from Sad Lane — the Horres property for one and a half years, amounting to £9 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description 'Dunnthorne' and amount of £6, both visually confirmed. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read 'Dunnithorne' and £2.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's interpretation: 'Carried up' is the description for the final total amount, which is clearly underlined as £343 6s 9d. gpt-5-mini incorrectly split this into two separate rows (one for the total amount with empty description, and another header row below for 'Carried up').
